Description: A flexible platform for managing diverse operational tasks, tracking projects, and streamlining workflows across various business and personal needs.
Users aim to build applications for streamlining various business operations, such as service booking, dispatch, inventory, and shipments.
Users inquire about the difficulty of adding new features, trackers, or notification systems to the product.
Users want to export their currently filtered data view into a CSV file for external analysis or sharing.

Use Case: Mobile Spacing Issues: Header and List Overlap
Description: Users report mobile display issues where header and list elements overlap, causing incorrect spacing.
Users are repeatedly encountering 401 errors even when they are actively logged into the system, preventing them from performing actions.
Users are concerned about potential issues with CORS and authentication redirects, requesting a thorough double-check for stability.
Users want to know if the app can connect to their existing authentication or database systems like OAuth, Firebase, or Postgres.
Users express a strong need to integrate with Webhooks for various external data transfer purposes.
Enhance the visual design of empty states to make them more appealing and less 'sad' for users.
Users want to deploy applications on Fly.io to avoid the complexities and responsibilities of self-hosting.
Users are experiencing a persistent redirect loop after attempting to log in, preventing access to the application.
Users report timezones are incorrectly displayed, often off by two hours, and suspect issues with UTC handling after no user changes.

Use Case: Blank Page After Save Button Click
Description: Users encounter a blank page after clicking save, preventing them from completing their work and shipping.

Use Case: Painful Table View Experience on MacBook
Description: MacBook users find the table view feature difficult and painful to use, highlighting a critical usability problem.

Use Case: Secure Secret Management with Environment Variables
Description: Users are requesting to avoid hardcoding secrets and instead use environment variables for secure configuration.
Users need audit logs to track who changed what and when for security and compliance.
Users require distinct permissions based on their roles, such as administrators versus normal users, to manage system access effectively.
Users perceive the current UI as crowded and request simplification to enhance clarity and user experience.
Users seek guidance on managing duplicate data entries when importing information from Excel spreadsheets into the system.
Users seek fundamental usage statistics and funnel analysis to understand product engagement and conversion.
Users frequently ask for a dark mode toggle to enhance visual comfort and reduce eye strain during use.
Users consistently express a strong preference for lightweight and minimalist designs, actively avoiding anything that feels heavy or cumbersome.
Users are expressing frustration and directly asking for help, indicating they are stuck and need assistance.
Users are encountering various glitches and functionality problems when using the product specifically within the Safari web browser.
Users are requesting a platform to create and manage a small community forum, including essential moderation capabilities.

Use Case: Verify RLS and Permissions for Sensitive Data
Description: Users want to ensure Row-Level Security and permissions are correctly configured for sensitive data storage.
Users want to know if Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) can be added later, emphasizing future planning.
Ensure that private notes are only visible to their respective owners, maintaining user confidentiality and data privacy.
Users report a bug where applied filters are not persistent and reset upon page refresh, causing frustration.
